title: “I spent $50,000 self-hosting AI models. You should too.” - 0xSero
summary: A developer discusses the value and feasibility of self-hosting AI models as an alternative to cloud services. The video covers local deployment options and related infrastructure considerations.
writeup: A developer (0xSero) makes the case for self-hosting AI models as an alternative to cloud services, drawing on a $50,000 build. The video walks through local deployment options and the infrastructure considerations that come with running inference locally. It frames self-hosting as a feasible path and weighs its practical value against reliance on hosted providers.
